Call ID: EXT-008
Type: external
Date: 2026-01-12
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Raj (account manager); Grace (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Raj): Hi Grace, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Grace): The reporting is powerful but the learning curve is steep.
AM (Raj): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Grace): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Raj): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Grace): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Raj): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
